page.title: Logs
page.description: The Logs page is part of the guided recovery flow. Use it to confirm whether install, startup, or gateway failures already produced useful diagnostics before changing config or service state.
page.metaWithUpdatedAt: Total logs: {{total}} lines, filtered: {{visible}} lines, last updated: {{updatedAt}}

runbook.title: Recovery context
runbook.description: Logs are usually the fastest way to validate whether the blocker is install-, config-, or service-related. Use the quick links to jump back once you know where the fault is.

summary.title: Error summary
summary.empty: No clear errors detected. If the service is still failing, try a different keyword or inspect the full log context.

viewer.filterPlaceholder: Filter logs with a keyword, e.g. EADDRINUSE / timeout
viewer.title: Log Viewer ({{count}} lines)
